commands.name: init
commands.description: Configure an existing Blazor WASM app for Blake.

options.name: --includeSampleContent
options.description:
Include sample page and update nav
bake <PATH>          Generate static content for a Blake site.

options.name: --disableDefaultRenderers
options.description: Disable the built-in Bootstrap container renderers

options.name: --includeDrafts
options.description: Bakes markdown files that contain 'draft: true' in the frontmatter (they are skipped by default)

options.name: --clean
options.description: Deletes the .generated folder before re-generating site content

options.name: --continueOnError
options.description:
Continues baking even if some pages fail to generate. By default, the process stops on the first error.
new <PATH>           Generates a new Blake site

options.name: --template
options.description: The name or short name of the template to create a site from (optional). Uses the default Blazor WASM template if not specified.

options.name: --siteName
options.description: The name of the new site (optional). Uses the directory name if not specified. If configured in the template, replaces the template name with the provided name.

options.name: --url
options.description: The URL of the repo that hosts the template (optional). Can be used to install templates outside the public Blake registry. Uses Git, so should work with any repo you have access to.

options.name: --list
options.description:
Lists all available templates in the public Blake registry
serve <PATH>         Bake and run the Blazor app in development mode.
